tasks.summary: Create test cases for user authentication module
tasks.description: Design and document comprehensive test cases covering login, logout, password reset, session expiry, and two-factor authentication flows. Ensure edge cases like invalid credentials and account lockout are covered.

tasks.summary: Automate login regression suite using Selenium
tasks.description: Implement automated regression tests for the login module using Selenium WebDriver and pytest. Scripts should cover positive and negative scenarios and integrate with the CI/CD pipeline.

tasks.summary: Verify bug fix for checkout page crash on mobile
tasks.description: Validate the developer fix for the critical crash reported on the checkout page when accessed from iOS Safari. Perform cross-browser and cross-device testing to confirm resolution.

tasks.summary: Write test plan for Sprint 4 feature set
tasks.description: Draft a comprehensive test plan for the Sprint 4 delivery including scope, approach, test types, entry/exit criteria, and risk assessment for the product recommendation engine feature.

tasks.summary: Automate product search and filter regression tests
tasks.description: Develop automation scripts for the product search module including keyword search, category filters, price range filters, and sort order validation using Playwright.

tasks.summary: Prepare test data for payment gateway integration testing
tasks.description: Generate and maintain test datasets for payment gateway scenarios including credit card, debit card, UPI, and wallet transactions. Include failure scenarios and edge cases.

tasks.summary: Performance testing for homepage and product listing pages
tasks.description: Execute load and stress tests on the homepage and product listing pages using JMeter. Target is to validate page load time under 2 seconds for 5000 concurrent users.

tasks.summary: Create test cases for shopping cart management
tasks.description: Write detailed test cases for add to cart, remove from cart, quantity update, saved cart, and cart-to-checkout flow including guest and logged-in user scenarios.

tasks.summary: Full regression testing for release 2.1.0
tasks.description: Execute the complete regression suite across all modules for the 2.1.0 release build. Document all defects found and track to closure before sign-off.

tasks.summary: Document test automation framework setup guide
tasks.description: Write a step-by-step setup guide for the Playwright-based automation framework including prerequisites, installation, configuration, and running the first test.

tasks.summary: Design test cases for mobile app onboarding flow
tasks.description: Create test cases for the new user onboarding journey including account registration, KYC document upload, OTP verification, and initial setup steps for both Android and iOS.

tasks.summary: Automate API tests for account creation endpoint
tasks.description: Write automated API tests using Postman/Newman for the account creation REST endpoint. Cover success scenarios, field validations, duplicate account checks, and error response codes.

tasks.summary: Verify fix for transaction history display bug
tasks.description: Validate the developer fix for the bug where transaction history showed duplicate entries after a network timeout. Test on both Android (v12+) and iOS (v16+) devices.

tasks.summary: Create test plan for mobile banking app v3.0
tasks.description: Prepare a thorough test plan for the v3.0 release covering new features like instant loans, investment module, and redesigned dashboard. Include scope, resources, and schedule.

tasks.summary: Automate push notification delivery validation
tasks.description: Build automation scripts to validate push notification delivery, content accuracy, deep-link navigation, and notification preferences using Appium and Firebase test lab.

tasks.summary: Prepare test data for biometric authentication testing
tasks.description: Set up test environments and data for fingerprint and face ID authentication testing. Blocked pending provisioning of physical test devices with enrolled biometric profiles from the IT team.

tasks.summary: Load testing for fund transfer API under peak load
tasks.description: Execute load tests on the fund transfer API simulating peak usage (10,000 concurrent transfers). Measure response times, error rates, and system throughput using Gatling.

tasks.summary: Create test cases for beneficiary management module
tasks.description: Write test cases for adding, editing, deleting, and verifying beneficiaries. Cover domestic and international beneficiaries, daily limits, and IFSC code validations.

tasks.summary: Regression suite execution for iOS build 302
tasks.description: Run full regression suite on iOS build 302 covering all critical user journeys. Test report submitted for review; awaiting sign-off from product owner before release.

tasks.summary: Update test case repository documentation for v3.0
tasks.description: Review and update all existing test case documents to reflect v3.0 UI changes, new API contracts, and deprecated features. Tag obsolete test cases accordingly.

tasks.summary: Design test cases for employee onboarding module
tasks.description: Create detailed test cases for the new hire onboarding module covering profile creation, document submission, asset assignment, induction scheduling, and onboarding checklist completion.

tasks.summary: Automate leave management UI test suite
tasks.description: Develop UI automation scripts for leave application, approval workflow, cancellation, and leave balance calculations using Cypress. Include multi-role scenarios (employee, manager, HR admin).

tasks.summary: Verify bug fix for payroll calculation rounding error
tasks.description: Validate the fix for the critical payroll bug where overtime calculations were rounded incorrectly, causing underpayment. Execute test cases across multiple employee categories and pay structures.

tasks.summary: Create test plan for Q2 HR module release
tasks.description: Draft the Q2 release test plan covering performance management, 360-degree feedback, and compliance reporting modules. Plan includes test strategy, environment setup, and sign-off checklist.

tasks.summary: Automate API tests for attendance tracking service
tasks.description: Create automated API tests for the attendance tracking microservice endpoints including clock-in/out, shift management, and overtime calculation APIs using RestAssured.

tasks.summary: Prepare test data for performance review module
tasks.description: Set up test data for annual performance review cycles including employee records, manager hierarchies, KPI definitions, and historical ratings across multiple departments.

tasks.summary: Stress testing for end-of-month payroll processing run
tasks.description: Simulate end-of-month payroll processing for 50,000 employees simultaneously using JMeter. Blocked as performance environment is not yet provisioned by the infrastructure team.

tasks.summary: Test cases for employee self-service portal redesign
tasks.description: Write and execute test cases for the redesigned employee self-service portal including profile update, pay slip download, tax declaration, and benefits enrollment.

tasks.summary: Regression testing after HR system module upgrade
tasks.description: Execute end-to-end regression suite after the core HR system upgrade to version 8.2. Validate all integrations with payroll, attendance, and recruitment modules remain intact.

tasks.summary: Document test coverage matrix for compliance audit
tasks.description: Create a test coverage matrix mapping all regulatory compliance requirements (GDPR, labor law) to corresponding test cases for the upcoming external audit in May.

tasks.summary: Create test cases for inventory intake workflow
tasks.description: Design test cases for the goods receiving and inventory intake workflow including PO matching, barcode scanning, quantity verification, and system stock update validation.

tasks.summary: Automate stock level monitoring and alert scripts
tasks.description: Build automated tests to validate stock level threshold alerts, reorder point notifications, and low stock email triggers using pytest and the inventory management API.

tasks.summary: Verify bug fix for barcode scanning misread error
tasks.description: Validate the developer fix for the critical issue where barcode scanner misread certain GS1-128 barcodes, causing incorrect stock updates. Tested on 3 different scanner hardware models.

tasks.summary: Write test plan for warehouse management sprint
tasks.description: Prepare the test plan for the warehouse management sprint covering bin location management, pick/pack workflows, and dispatch module. Includes risk log and contingency approach.

tasks.summary: Automate order fulfillment end-to-end regression tests
tasks.description: Implement end-to-end automation for the order fulfillment pipeline from order receipt to dispatch including pick list generation, packing confirmation, and shipping label creation.

tasks.summary: Prepare test data for multi-warehouse scenarios
tasks.description: Create test data representing multi-warehouse inventory distribution, inter-warehouse transfer scenarios, and cross-dock operations. Blocked on access to staging warehouse data from ops team.

tasks.summary: Performance testing for inventory report generation
tasks.description: Measure report generation time for inventory valuation and stock movement reports with datasets of 1M+ records. Acceptance threshold is under 30 seconds for standard reports.

tasks.summary: Test cases for supplier portal integration
tasks.description: Write test cases for the new supplier portal integration covering PO acknowledgement, ASN creation, delivery scheduling, and invoice submission workflows.

tasks.summary: Full regression testing for v4.5.0 release
tasks.description: Completed full regression suite for the v4.5.0 release across all inventory, warehousing, and procurement modules. Test summary report submitted and awaiting PO sign-off.

tasks.summary: Update QA wiki with new test procedures
tasks.description: Update the QA team wiki with new test procedures for the supplier portal integration, updated regression checklists, and revised environment setup instructions.

tasks.summary: Create test cases for support ticket creation flow
tasks.description: Design test cases for the end-to-end support ticket creation flow including channel intake (email, chat, web form), auto-categorisation, priority assignment, and agent routing.

tasks.summary: Automate chatbot response accuracy validation tests
tasks.description: Write automated tests to validate chatbot intent recognition accuracy, fallback handling, and escalation triggers using the chatbot API and a curated dataset of 200+ test utterances.

tasks.summary: Verify fix for email notification delivery failure bug
tasks.description: Validate the fix for the critical bug where ticket resolution emails were not delivered to customers using certain mail providers. Tested across Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, and corporate email domains.

tasks.summary: Test plan for customer portal redesign project
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive test plan for the customer portal redesign covering usability, accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), functional regression, and integration with CRM. Approved and baselined.

tasks.summary: Automate SLA breach detection and alert testing
tasks.description: Implement automation for SLA breach alert validation. Blocked because the SLA calculation service has a known defect (DEF-2241) that is pending developer fix before automation can proceed.

tasks.summary: Prepare test data for multi-language support testing
tasks.description: Create localised test datasets and user profiles for UI testing in English, French, German, Spanish, and Arabic. Include RTL layout validation scenarios for Arabic.

tasks.summary: Performance testing for knowledge base search feature
tasks.description: Conduct performance testing on the knowledge base search to ensure sub-1-second response times for 2000 concurrent users querying against a 50,000-article dataset.

tasks.summary: Test cases for agent ticket escalation workflow
tasks.description: Write and execute test cases for the escalation workflow including tier-1 to tier-2 escalation, manager override, escalation notifications, and SLA timer reset upon escalation.

tasks.summary: Regression testing after UI framework upgrade
tasks.description: Executed full regression suite post-upgrade of the frontend framework from React 17 to React 18. Report submitted for review; pending stakeholder sign-off for production deployment.

tasks.summary: Create test automation runbook for onboarding new QA members
tasks.description: Author a runbook covering the automation framework, test execution steps, reporting process, and common troubleshooting steps to help onboard new QA team members quickly.

tasks.summary: Create test cases for report generation module
tasks.description: Write test cases for the report generation module covering scheduled reports, on-demand reports, export formats (PDF, Excel, CSV), and email delivery of generated reports.

tasks.summary: Automate dashboard data accuracy validation tests
tasks.description: Build automated data validation scripts to compare dashboard KPI values against source database queries, ensuring data accuracy across all dashboard widgets and time range filters.

tasks.summary: Verify fix for CSV export character encoding bug
tasks.description: Validate the fix for the critical bug where CSV exports contained garbled characters for non-ASCII data (Japanese, Arabic, French accented characters). Tested across multiple locale settings.

tasks.summary: Test plan for analytics engine v2.0 release
tasks.description: Create the test plan for the analytics engine v2.0 release covering new ML-powered forecasting, anomaly detection, and trend analysis features. Approved and signed off by stakeholders.

tasks.summary: Automate scheduled report delivery validation tests
tasks.description: Implement automated tests to verify scheduled report delivery including correct timing, recipient list accuracy, report content freshness, and failure retry mechanisms.

tasks.summary: Prepare test data for large dataset performance scenarios
tasks.description: Generate synthetic datasets of 10M+ rows for performance testing of the analytics engine. Data must represent realistic distributions across product categories, regions, and time periods.

tasks.summary: Performance testing for real-time analytics dashboard
tasks.description: Execute real-time dashboard performance tests with 3000 concurrent users. Blocked because the test environment has not been scaled to match production specs. Infrastructure ticket raised.

tasks.summary: Test cases for drill-down analytics feature
tasks.description: Write test cases for the new drill-down analytics feature allowing users to navigate from summary charts to detailed data views. Cover multiple hierarchy levels and cross-filter interactions.

tasks.summary: Regression testing for Q1 analytics reporting release
tasks.description: Executed full regression for the Q1 reporting release. All 142 regression test cases passed. Release signed off and deployed to production on schedule.

tasks.summary: Document data quality testing framework and guidelines
tasks.description: Write documentation for the data quality testing framework including validation rules, data profiling approach, anomaly detection test patterns, and integration with the CI/CD pipeline.
